title: Visual Comparison of Open and Closed Spheres in a Metric Space
description: A visual representation showing the defining characteristics and key differences between an open sphere and a closed sphere, centered at the same point with the same radius.
elements: Open Sphere S(p, r) boundary (dashed circle)
Closed Sphere S[p, r] boundary (solid circle)
relationships: The open sphere contains all points where distance from p is strictly less than r
The closed sphere contains all points where distance from p is less than or equal to r
The closed sphere includes its boundary points, while the open sphere does not
